zh.lifeSummary: William Talbot III   Lord Of Gainsborough是Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe的兒子，於大約1083年出生在英國林可爾史爾蓋斯波洛。他和Ermentrude Ferreres至少有5個兒子。他去世於1158年在英國英格蘭越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾喬姆斯利。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: William Talbot III   Lord Of Gainsborough was born about 1083, in Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England as the son of Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe. He had at least 5 sons with Ermentrude Ferreres. He died in 1158, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Wormsley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: William Talbot III   Lord Of Gainsborough est né environ 1083, à Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, fils de Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Ermentrude Ferreres. Il est décédé en 1158, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Wormsley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Ermentrude Ferreres mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1158 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wormsley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Talbot III   Lord Of Gainsborough è nato il circa 1083 nel Gainsborough, Lincolnshire, England come figlio di Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Ermentrude Ferreres. Morì nel 1158, nel Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Wormsley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Talbot III   Lord Of Gainsboroughは約1083年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアガインスボロウでGeoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombeの息子として生まれた。彼はErmentrude Ferreresとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1158年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウオルムスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Talbot III   Lord Of Gainsborough(은)는 대략 1083년 영국 링코실르 게인스버루에서 Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Ermentrude Ferreres(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1158년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 워슬리에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Ermentrude Ferreres. ru.lifeSummary: William Talbot III   Lord Of Gainsborough родился около 1083 г. в местности геинсбороую, линколншир, Англия. Его отца звали Geoffrey I Talbot of Swanscombe. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Ermentrude Ferreres. Он умер в 1158 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности вормсли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
